mapper.select: SELECT id, name, http_method, endpoint, version, status, description, created_at, updated_at FROM pgdev.api_endpoints ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT f.id, f.field_scope, f.field_location, f.field_name, f.field_type, f.required_yn, f.field_order, f.description, f.sample_value, f.default_value FROM pgdev.api_endpoint_fields f JOIN pgdev.api_endpoint_versions v ON v.id = f.api_version_id JOIN pgdev.api_definitions d ON d.id = v.api_definition_id WHERE d.api_name = #{apiName} AND v.version = #{version} ORDER BY CASE f.field_scope WHEN 'REQUEST' THEN 1 WHEN 'RESPONSE' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, f.field_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pgdev.api_endpoints (name, http_method, endpoint, version, status, description, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{httpMethod}, #{endpoint}, #{version}, #{status}, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
